subcodes.title: Lawh-i-Mahmud Furughi
subcodes.first_line: O thou who art lost and wandering in the desert! Though thou roamest the wilderness like unto the wind, thou art intoxicated with the wine of divine bounty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای گمگشته بادیه پیما اگرچه چون باد بادیه پیماای ولی از جام عنایت سرمست
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice, @relationship between government and people, @obedience to and respect for government authority, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience
